title: Issue in integration message item field
excerpt:
Hi, 
I am developing an app for sending sms. 
I succeeded in sending the message, but there is an issue. 
The field item value was not fetched from the message and is recognized as a string. 
 
Can anyone help me?

posts.author: Tobi (Tobi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I am developing an app for sending sms.

I succeeded in sending the message, but there is an issue.
The field item value was not fetched from the message and is recognized as a string.

Can anyone help me?

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Tobi - welcome!

Just to clarify - are you trying to get the item values using the monday app integration? If so - unfortunately this is something that isn’t supported at the moment.

The current workaround would be to get these values using the API and then update the message accordingly within the app on monday.com

Let me know if that helps!

-Daniel
